replication_match.note: Independent run from different session with 691 vs 694 lessons. Near-identical results confirm robustness.

additional_findings.domain_tag_effect: NEGATIVE (β_d=-0.38): domain-specific lessons are LESS cited than generalists
additional_findings.domain_bic: INCONCLUSIVE (ΔBIC=+1.78) — does not survive BIC penalty
additional_findings.gamma_shift: PA exponent drops 0.75→0.735 when fitness controlled — fitness absorbs ~2% of PA signal
additional_findings.three_force_decomposition: proximity ~82% + PA ~13% + fitness ~5% of joint LL gain

verdict: FITNESS CONFIRMED (REPLICATION): Sharpe score predicts citation beyond PA+proximity. β_s=0.264, ΔBIC=+75.1. exp(0.264)=1.30x per Sharpe unit. Generalist lessons receive more citations than domain-specific.
